final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original Chinese ink wash landscape painting in the traditional shanshui tradition.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash painting (shuimo hua), literati style inspired by Song Dynasty masters, rice paper texture with visible brush strokes
Composition: vertical scroll format, layered depth with distant mountains, middle ground mist, and foreground details, generous negative space
Subject: elderly scholar in simple robes fishing by a stream, solitary figure embodying reclusion and contemplation
Scene/backdrop: distant mountains in indigo-blue haze ("远山如黛"), winding stream with gentle ripples, pine trees with gnarled trunks, thatched cottage partially hidden, mist and clouds drifting between peaks
Lighting/mood: soft diffused atmosphere, ethereal and transcendent mood, sense of vast emptiness and spiritual distance
Color palette: monochromatic ink gradations from wet black to dry gray, subtle blue-green mineral accents on distant peaks, warm sepia tones on cottage roof
Materials/textures: rice paper absorbency showing brush dry/wet variations, ink bleeding at edges, visible calligraphic stroke work
Constraints: must embody Eastern aesthetic philosophy of emptiness and suggestion over literal depiction;留白 (liubai/negative space) must dominate at least 40% of composition
Avoid: Western perspective rules, photographic realism, saturated colors, heavy outlines, decorative patterns, signature seals in corners
